```json
{
  "risk": "MEDIUM",
  "riskReason": "Cache deletion handler lacks input validation and error handling, credential deletion mutation updates wrong cache, and truncated component code suggests incomplete review.",
  "circularTests": {
    "detected": false,
    "count": 0,

    "details": ""
  },
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "category": "Input Validation",
      "file": "packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/calendars/deleteCache.handler.ts",
      "line": null,
      "title": "Missing credentialId validation before cache deletion",
      "description": "The deleteCache handler accepts a credentialId but does not validate that it belongs to the current user. An attacker could potentially delete calendar cache for other users' credentials by guessing credential IDs. The handler should verify the credential ownership before executing the deletion.",
      "suggestion": "Add authorization check: verify that the credentialId belongs to the authenticated user before proceeding with cache deletion. Example: `const credential = await db.credential.findFirst({ where: { id: credentialId, userId: user.id } }); if (!credential) throw new UnauthorizedError();`"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "category": "Cache Invalidation",
      "file": "packages/features/apps/components/CredentialActionsDropdown.tsx",
      "line": 58,
      "title": "Incorrect cache invalidation in disconnect mutation",
      "description": "The disconnectMutation invalidates `utils.viewer.calendars.connectedCalendars` and `utils.viewer.apps.integrations` but the deleteCache mutation only calls `onSuccess` without any cache invalidation. When cache is deleted, the UI won't reflect the updated state since connectedCalendars query still holds stale data showing old cache timestamp.",
      "suggestion": "Add cache invalidation to deleteCacheMutation: `await utils.viewer.calendars.connectedCalendars.invalidate();` in the onSuccess callback to ensure UI reflects the deleted cache state."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "category": "Error Handling",
      "file": "packages/trpc/server/routers/viewer/calendars/deleteCache.handler.ts",
      "line": null,
      "title": "Unhandled error condition in cache deletion",
      "description": "The handler deletes cache records but does not check if any records were actually deleted or handle the case where credentialId doesn't exist. The mutation could silently fail if the credential doesn't have cached calendars, leaving the caller uncertain about success.",
      "suggestion": "Add validation: check the result of `deleteMany` operation and throw an explicit error if no records were deleted or credential doesn't exist. Log deletion attempt for audit trail."
    }
  ]
}
```
